channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: SpeechDx: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Clinical Speech AI
item.description: arXiv:2606.17339v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speech offers a uniquely informative window into health by simultaneously engaging neurological, motor, respiratory, and vocal systems. Current clinical speech AI methods have largely progressed through isolated condition-specific studies, making resu...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> audio, product, framework, model, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions
item.description: arXiv:2606.17266v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production planning increasingly has to treat workforce capability as a decision variable: certifications lapse when skills are not maintained, new products require skills the current workforce does not hold, and reskilling competes for the same worke...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> release, arxiv, model, product | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
item.description: Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)
